IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (14789139.pdf)
SUMMARY: 25+ years of diverse experience in health care, private sector, local and state government, and aerospace/defense contracting. Proven leadership, communication, project planning, budgeting, design, change control, execution, implementation, and support skills.
SKILLS: Leadership, Communication, Project Planning, Budgeting, Design, Change Control, Execution, Implementation, Service Now, ITIL Active Directory, Office 365, Cerner System Implementation, Land Management PMO Upgrade, Fire Department Enterprise Architecture, Property Tax System Replacement, County Telecommunications, CRM Projects, Proof of Concept Internet Marketing Solution, Altris Product Suite Rearchitecturing, Arco Alaska Project Management, Bell Helicopter Project Management, MCA/Universal Contracts Solution Implementation

JOB TITLE: Director of Information Technology
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 10/2013 - Present
DESCRIPTION: Member of the Health Care Executive team responsible for technology delivery to two hospitals, 40 clinics, Public Health, Behavioral Health, Medical Examiner and County's Health Insurance plan. Implemented Service Now, ITIL Active Directory, Office 365. Led Project Leadership Academy.
